meta.title: YQArch Commands Reference
meta.subtitle: Essential AutoCAD Plugin for Municipal Drawing
meta.description: Complete YQArch command reference with prioritized list of essential commands for municipal drawing work.
meta.targetAudience: Civil engineers, municipal planners, architects working with YQArch plugin
prerequisites: Basic knowledge of municipal drawing standards

essentialCommands.title: Essential Commands for Municipal Drawing
essentialCommands.description: The most critical YQArch commands for daily municipal drawing work, ranked by frequency and importance.

commands.name: Set Drawing / System Scale
commands.municipalUse: ALWAYS use first. Set 1:500 for site plans, 1:100 for building plans, 1:200 for utility layouts.
commands.tip: Used every time you start a municipal drawing to set correct scale.

commands.name: Draw Grid Axis
commands.municipalUse: Essential for site plans. Set spacing to 50m for large sites, 20m for small sites. Label with numbers and letters for legal referencing.
commands.tip: Creates coordinate grids for site planning and lot referencing. Used first when starting any site plan.

commands.name: Draw Wall
commands.municipalUse: Create property boundary walls (0.1m thick), building footprints, retaining walls. Use 0.23m for brick walls, 0.15m for concrete walls.
commands.tip: Draws building footprints, boundary walls, retaining walls. Most used command for creating any building or boundary.

commands.name: Dim Linear / Dim Aligned
commands.municipalUse: Dimension property lines, road widths (6m), setbacks (3m front, 2m rear). Most used dimension command.
commands.tip: Essential for dimensioning property lines, setbacks, road widths. Used on every municipal drawing.

commands.name: Accumulate Area
commands.municipalUse: ESSENTIAL for site area, building coverage ratio, parking calculations, and green space area.
commands.tip: Calculates site area, building coverage, parking areas. Critical for zoning compliance calculations.

commands.name: Double Lines
commands.municipalUse: ESSENTIAL for drawing roads (6m carriageway + 1.5m sidewalks), utility trenches, fence lines. Set spacing to road width.
commands.tip: Draws parallel lines for roads, sidewalks, utility trenches. Very common in site plans.

commands.name: Collect Coordinates
commands.municipalUse: Export property corner coordinates for legal descriptions and survey records.
commands.tip: Exports survey points, property corners, utility locations. Required for legal descriptions and survey data.

commands.name: Drawing Frame (A0-A4)
commands.municipalUse: Adds title block for submission. Used on every sheet for permit applications.
commands.tip: Used on every sheet for permit applications.

commands.name: Isolate Layers
commands.municipalUse: ESSENTIAL — view only roads layer, only utilities, or only buildings for focused work.
commands.tip: Focuses on specific layers (roads, utilities, parcels). Used constantly when working on complex drawings.

commands.name: Quick Hatching
commands.municipalUse: ESSENTIAL for zoning maps — hatch residential zones, commercial zones, park areas, utility easements with different patterns.
commands.tip: Hatches zoning areas, park spaces, utility easements. Used frequently for land use differentiation.

commands.name: YQ Block Library
commands.municipalUse: ESSENTIAL — insert standard municipal symbols like manholes, streetlights, fire hydrants, trees, catch basins.
commands.tip: Insert standard municipal symbols. Used heavily in site plans.

commands.name: Building Area Statistics
commands.municipalUse: Compute total FSI/FAR for zoning compliance — critical for permit approval.
commands.tip: Computes total floor area for zoning compliance. Essential for permit calculations.

commands.name: Open Door / Open Window
commands.municipalUse: Places doors/windows on building elevations. Required for building permit drawings.
commands.tip: Required for building permit drawings.

commands.name: Designed Elevation
commands.municipalUse: Label building finished floor levels (FFL), road centerline elevations, and drainage inverts.
commands.tip: Labels finished floor elevations, road centerlines. Important for grading and drainage.

commands.name: Geodesic Coordinates
commands.municipalUse: Add GPS coordinates at property corners for legal descriptions. Required for survey submissions.
commands.tip: Adds GPS coordinates to site plan. Required for legal property descriptions.

commands.name: Purge All in DWG
commands.municipalUse: MUST-DO before submitting to municipality. Reduces file size and removes junk data.
commands.tip: Cleans unused items before submission. Must-do before sending to municipality.

commands.name: Batch-Plot
commands.municipalUse: Prints all permit sheets at once. Saves time on every submission.
commands.tip: Saves time on every submission.

commands.name: Turn Off All Layers
commands.municipalUse: Very common — quickly clear all clutter to work on one discipline at a time.
commands.tip: Quickly clears clutter to examine one discipline. Used frequently for focused work.

commands.name: Auto Serial Number
commands.municipalUse: Number building units, parking spaces, or utility poles sequentially.
commands.tip: Common in subdivisions.

commands.name: Change Hatching Scale
commands.municipalUse: Adjust hatch scale after changing drawing scale. Common when switching from 1:500 to 1:100.
commands.tip: Often needed after scale changes.

commands.name: Win/Door List
commands.municipalUse: Required table for building permit submissions.
commands.tip: Generates door/window schedule. Required for building permits.

commands.name: Merge Layers
commands.municipalUse: Consolidate imported survey layers (SURVEY-ROAD, SURVEY-BLDG) into standard layers (A-ROAD, A-BLDG).
commands.tip: Common when combining survey data.

commands.name: Contour Elevation
commands.municipalUse: Label existing ground levels on topo surveys. Critical for grading and drainage analysis.
commands.tip: Used on topo surveys and grading plans.

commands.name: Slope Symbol
commands.municipalUse: ESSENTIAL — shows drainage direction, ramp slopes. Required for ADA compliance (max 1:12 slope).
commands.tip: Shows drainage direction and ramp slopes.

commands.name: Material List
commands.municipalUse: Calculate concrete, asphalt, and paving quantities for cost estimates.
commands.tip: Used for cost estimates.

commands.name: Arrow Leader
commands.municipalUse: Annotates easement notes, utility callouts. Common for special conditions.
commands.tip: Common for special conditions annotations.

commands.name: Set Viewport Scale
commands.municipalUse: Set site plan viewports to 1:500, building plans to 1:100, details to 1:50 for municipal submission.
commands.tip: Used for every sheet layout.

commands.name: Section Plane Symbols
commands.municipalUse: Mark building section cuts for permit review drawings.
commands.tip: Used in detailed building plans.

commands.name: Clear Z-axis of Objs
commands.municipalUse: Flattens imported 3D survey data to 2D plan view. Very common with GPS survey imports.
commands.tip: Common when importing survey points.

commands.name: Eliminate Overlapping
commands.municipalUse: Clean up duplicate lines from imported survey data. Critical before area calculations.
commands.tip: Important for clean drawings.

categories.title: System & Interface
categories.description: Core plugin configuration, interface controls, and system preferences.

commands.name: User Preferences
commands.description: Opens YQArch user preferences to customize plugin behavior.

commands.name: YQArch Command Pane
commands.description: Toggles the YQArch command panel on/off.

commands.name: Show YQArch Toolbars
commands.description: Displays all YQArch toolbars.

commands.name: Hide YQArch Toolbars
commands.description: Hides all YQArch toolbars.

commands.name: Select Current User
commands.description: Switches between different user profiles/settings.

commands.name: Select Language
commands.description: Changes the plugin interface language.

commands.name: Set Default Units
commands.description: Sets the default drawing units (mm, cm, m, etc.).

commands.name: Reload YQArch Menu
commands.description: Refreshes the YQArch menu after customization.

commands.name: Set Drawing / System Scale
commands.description: Sets the scale for the current drawing and symbols.
commands.municipalUse: Set 1:500 for site plans, 1:100 for building plans, 1:200 for utility layouts.

commands.name: Drawing Frame (A0-A4)
commands.description: Inserts a standardized drawing frame/title block.
commands.municipalUse: Adds title block for submission. Used on every sheet for permit applications.

commands.name: YQArch Help
commands.description: Opens the help documentation.

commands.name: YQArch Version
commands.description: Displays current YQArch version.

commands.name: YQArch Website
commands.description: Opens the YQArch official website.

commands.name: Donate / Support
commands.description: Opens donation/support page.

commands.name: About YQArch
commands.description: Shows software credits and info.

commands.name: YQArch Uninstall
commands.description: Starts the uninstallation process.

categories.title: Main Interface Tools
categories.description: Primary command palette shortcuts that open grouped tool panels.

commands.name: System Setup
commands.description: Opens main system setup dialog for YQArch.

commands.name: Plane Wall/Column
commands.description: Draws walls or columns in plan view.

commands.name: Plane Window/Door
commands.description: Places windows or doors in plan view.

commands.name: Building Component
commands.description: Opens building component library (stairs, ramps, etc.).

commands.name: Decoration Component
commands.description: Opens decoration component library (furniture, fixtures).

commands.name: Architectural Symbols
commands.description: Inserts architectural symbols (north arrows, elevation marks).

commands.name: Indexer Symbols
commands.description: Inserts indexing symbols (section cuts, detail references).

commands.name: Statistics Tools
commands.description: Opens area, length, and counting tools.

commands.name: Text Content
commands.description: Creates or edits multi-line text content.

commands.name: Text Modify
commands.description: Advanced text modification tools.

commands.name: Dimension Draw
commands.description: Starts dimension drawing commands.

commands.name: Dimension Modify
commands.description: Modifies existing dimensions.

commands.name: Curve Tools
commands.description: Tools for editing curves, polylines, arcs.

commands.name: Extra Tool
commands.description: Additional utilities like double lines, alignment.

commands.name: Modify Plus
commands.description: Advanced modification tools (scale per object, dynamic copy).

commands.name: Check And Correct
commands.description: Drawing cleanup and error checking tools.

commands.name: Block Tools
commands.description: Block creation, renaming, and management.

commands.name: Hatching Tool
commands.description: Hatching and pattern tools.

commands.name: Layer Tool
commands.description: Layer management shortcuts.

commands.name: View Point Tool
commands.description: Viewport and layout tools.

commands.name: Matching Brush
commands.description: Copies properties from one object to another.

commands.name: Other Tools
commands.description: Miscellaneous utilities (batch plot, DWG catalog, etc.).

categories.title: Axis & Grid
categories.description: Commands for drawing and managing axis lines and coordinate grids.

commands.name: Draw Axis Line
commands.description: Draws a single axis line.
commands.municipalUse: Mark property boundaries and setback lines.

commands.name: Draw Grid Axis
commands.description: Creates a rectangular grid of axes.
commands.municipalUse: Essential for site plans. Set spacing to 50m for large sites, 20m for small sites. Label with numbers and letters for legal referencing.

commands.name: Axis Lines Of Walls
commands.description: Generates axis lines from existing walls.
commands.municipalUse: Quick structural grid from building footprints for permit drawings.

commands.name: Rebuilt Wall Axis
commands.description: Rebuilds axis lines based on wall positions.
commands.municipalUse: Update structural grid after building layout changes.

categories.title: Wall & Column
categories.description: Tools for drawing, modifying, and managing walls and structural columns.

commands.name: Draw Wall
commands.description: Draws a wall with specified thickness and height.
commands.municipalUse: Create property boundary walls (0.1m thick), building footprints, retaining walls. Use 0.23m for brick walls, 0.15m for concrete walls.

commands.name: Wall Scissor
commands.description: Cuts or trims walls at intersections.
commands.municipalUse: Clean wall intersections at building corners and T-junctions.

commands.name: Change Wall Thickness
commands.description: Changes the thickness of selected walls.
commands.municipalUse: Adjust boundary wall thickness after municipal code review.

commands.name: Wall Offsetting
commands.description: Offsets a wall by a specified distance.
commands.municipalUse: Create setback lines parallel to property boundaries.

commands.name: Fill in Walls / Columns
commands.description: Fills wall or column outlines with a hatch/pattern.
commands.municipalUse: Hatch building footprints to show coverage area on site plans.

commands.name: Rectangular Column
commands.description: Creates a rectangular column in plan.
commands.municipalUse: Place structural columns at grid intersections for permit drawings.

commands.name: 'O' Shape Column
commands.description: Creates an O-shaped (circular/oval) column.

commands.name: 'L' Shape Column
commands.description: Creates an L-shaped column.

commands.name: 'T' Shape Column
commands.description: Creates a T-shaped column.

commands.name: '+' Shape Column
commands.description: Creates a plus-shaped column.

commands.name: Arrange Columns
commands.description: Automatically arranges columns along an axis or grid.

commands.name: Convert To Column
commands.description: Converts selected polylines/circles into columns.

commands.name: Fill In Columns
commands.description: Fills column outlines with a hatch.

commands.name: Del Win/Dr/Wall/Col
commands.description: Erases selected windows, doors, walls, or columns.

categories.title: Door & Window
categories.description: Insert, modify, and manage doors and windows within walls.

commands.name: Open Door
commands.description: Opens a door in a selected wall.
commands.municipalUse: Required for building permit drawings.

commands.name: Draw A Door
commands.description: Draws a door with custom parameters.

commands.name: Open Window
commands.description: Opens a window in a selected wall.
commands.municipalUse: Required for building permit drawings.

commands.name: Draw a Window
commands.description: Draws a window with custom parameters.

commands.name: Replace Window/Door
commands.description: Replaces an existing door/window with a different type.

commands.name: Auto Open Hole
commands.description: Automatically creates opening holes for doors/windows.

commands.name: Open Pocket Door
commands.description: Opens a pocket sliding door.

commands.name: Draw a Pocket Door
commands.description: Draws a pocket sliding door with parameters.

commands.name: Replace By Pocket Door
commands.description: Replaces an existing door with a pocket door.

commands.name: Open Param Window
commands.description: Opens a parameterized window dialog.

commands.name: Draw a Param Window
commands.description: Draws a parameterized window.

commands.name: Replace by Param window
commands.description: Replaces existing window with parameterized one.

commands.name: Open Corner Window
commands.description: Opens a corner window at wall intersection.

commands.name: Replace Corner Window
commands.description: Replaces existing window with a corner window.

commands.name: Doorsill Manager
commands.description: Manages doorsill settings and placement.

commands.name: Door Opening Manager
commands.description: Manages door opening parameters.

commands.name: Lines of Windows
commands.description: Creates line representations of windows.

commands.name: Change Window/Door Width
commands.description: Changes the width of a selected window or door.

commands.name: Move Window/Door
commands.description: Moves a window or door along a wall.

commands.name: Repair Win/Door/Column
commands.description: Repairs corrupted or missing window/door/column data.

commands.name: Move and Fix
commands.description: Moves an object and fixes it to wall/alignment.

commands.name: Copy and Fix
commands.description: Copies an object and fixes it to wall/alignment.

commands.name: Mirror and Fix
commands.description: Mirrors an object and fixes it to wall/alignment.

commands.name: Window Serial Number
commands.description: Adds automatic serial numbers to windows.

commands.name: Index of Components

commands.name: Plan of Elevator

commands.name: Elevation of Door

commands.name: Section of Door

commands.name: Section of Bay Win

commands.name: Elevation of Window

commands.name: Section of Window
commands.description: Creates window section view.

commands.name: Elev/Sect of Shutter
commands.description: Creates elevation/section of shutters.

commands.name: Curtain Wall Glass
commands.description: Draws a curtain wall with glass panels.

commands.name: Lines to Window Elev

commands.name: SN. to Window Elev

commands.name: Elevation of Curtain Wall

commands.name: Section of Partition

commands.name: Elevation Banister
commands.description: Creates banister/railing elevation.

commands.name: Section of Staircase

commands.name: Section of Steps
commands.description: Creates section view of steps.

commands.name: Section of Waterproof

categories.title: Statistics & Data
categories.description: Area calculations, coordinate collection, schedules, tables, and material takeoffs.

commands.name: Index of Statistics
commands.description: Opens statistics tools panel.

commands.name: Easy Filtered Select
commands.description: Selects objects with easy filtering options.
commands.municipalUse: Quickly select all dimensions, all text, or all hatches for batch editing.

commands.name: Auto Serial Number
commands.description: Automatically numbers selected objects.
commands.municipalUse: Number building units, parking spaces, or utility poles sequentially.

commands.description: Creates an empty table in the drawing.
commands.municipalUse: Create zoning compliance tables, parking calculation summaries.

commands.description: Aligns text inside table cells.

commands.description: Calculates cell area based on contained text.

commands.description: Converts text to editable table cell.

commands.description: Converts selected text into a table.
commands.municipalUse: Organize scattered site notes into a formatted permit table.

commands.municipalUse: Required table for building permit submissions.

commands.description: Lists all block attributes and their values.

commands.name: Material List
commands.description: Generates a bill of materials.

commands.name: Accumulate Area
commands.description: Calculates total area of selected objects.
commands.municipalUse: ESSENTIAL for site area, building coverage ratio, parking calculations, and green space area.

commands.name: Area Link Text
commands.description: Links area calculation to text (auto-updates).
commands.municipalUse: Create auto-updating area labels that change when boundaries are modified.

commands.name: Accumulate Perimeter
commands.description: Calculates total perimeter of selected objects.
commands.municipalUse: Calculate total boundary length for fencing estimates.

commands.name: Perimeter Link Text
commands.description: Links perimeter calculation to text (auto-updates).

commands.name: Calculate Weight
commands.description: Calculates weight based on area/thickness/material.

commands.name: Building Area Statistics
commands.description: Calculates total building area including all floors.
commands.municipalUse: Compute total FSI/FAR for zoning compliance — critical for permit approval.

commands.name: Addition (+)
commands.description: Adds two numbers or values.

commands.name: Subtraction (-)
commands.description: Subtracts two numbers or values.

commands.name: Multiplication (*)
commands.description: Multiplies two numbers or values.

commands.name: Division (/)
commands.description: Divides two numbers or values.

commands.name: Eval. Expression
commands.description: Evaluates a mathematical expression.

categories.title: Text Tools
categories.description: Create, edit, format, translate, and manage text objects in drawings.

commands.description: Updates text based on a list of replacements.

commands.name: Input a Text

commands.name: Modify Any Text

commands.name: Create/Input Texts

commands.name: Edit/Output Texts
commands.description: Edits and outputs multiple texts to file.

commands.name: Replace/Calculate
commands.description: Replaces text and performs calculations.

commands.name: Replace Substrings
commands.description: Replaces a substring within text objects.

commands.name: Join Texts
commands.description: Joins multiple text objects into one.

commands.name: Merge Multi-Line Text
commands.description: Merges separate text lines into a single multi-line text.

commands.name: Break Text
commands.description: Breaks a multi-line text into separate lines.

commands.name: Text to Characters
commands.description: Explodes text into individual character objects.

commands.name: Increment Duplicate
commands.description: Creates incremental copies (1,2,3...).

commands.name: Add Increment
commands.description: Adds increment numbers to selected texts.

commands.name: Increase Text
commands.description: Increases numerical content of text by a value.

commands.name: Seek Specific Text

commands.name: Exchange Content
commands.description: Swaps content between two text objects.

commands.name: New Text Style

commands.name: Set Current Style
commands.description: Sets the current text style.

commands.name: Update Text By Style
commands.description: Updates all text of a style to match style settings.

commands.name: Auto Replace Fonts
commands.description: Automatically replaces missing fonts.

commands.name: Change Text
commands.description: Changes text content (batch).

commands.name: Change Height/Aspects
commands.description: Changes text height or width factor.

commands.name: Reorder Table Text
commands.description: Reorders text inside a table.

commands.name: Text Alignment Left
commands.description: Aligns text to the left.

commands.name: Text Alignment Right
commands.description: Aligns text to the right.

commands.name: Restored Mirrored/Rot
commands.description: Restores mirrored or rotated text to normal orientation.

commands.name: Convert Texts/Attdefs
commands.description: Converts text to attribute definitions or vice versa.

commands.name: Explode Texts To Line
commands.description: Explodes text into line/vector objects.

categories.title: Dimension Tools
categories.description: Comprehensive dimensioning commands for linear, angular, radial, and baseline measurements.

commands.name: Set Dwg/Sym. Scale
commands.description: Sets drawing and symbol scale.
commands.municipalUse: ALWAYS use first. Set 1:500 for site plans, 1:100 for building plans, 1:200 for utility layouts.

commands.name: Dim Linear
commands.description: Creates a linear dimension.
commands.municipalUse: Dimension property lines, road widths (6m), setbacks (3m front, 2m rear). Most used dimension command.

commands.name: Dim Aligned
commands.description: Creates an aligned dimension.
commands.municipalUse: Dimension angled property boundaries and diagonal building dimensions.

commands.name: Dim Baseline
commands.description: Creates a baseline dimension from a previous dimension.

commands.name: Dim Radius
commands.description: Creates a radius dimension.
commands.municipalUse: Dimension curved roads, roundabouts, and cul-de-sacs.

commands.name: Dim Diameter
commands.description: Creates a diameter dimension.

commands.name: Dim Angular
commands.description: Creates an angular dimension.
commands.municipalUse: Measure corner angles at property boundaries.

commands.name: Dim Arch Length
commands.description: Creates an arc length dimension.

commands.name: Dim 3 Point's Arc
commands.description: Creates a dimension for an arc defined by 3 points.

commands.name: Dim Quick
commands.description: Quickly dimensions selected objects.
commands.municipalUse: Fast dimensioning of multiple building elements.

commands.name: Dim Closed Space
commands.description: Dimensions a closed space (room).
commands.municipalUse: Auto-dimension room sizes for floor plans.

commands.name: Dim Closed PLine
commands.description: Dimensions a closed polyline.

commands.name: Dim PLine/Lines
commands.description: Dimensions a polyline or multiple lines.

commands.name: Dim Of Axis/Windows
commands.description: Dimensions axes or windows.
commands.municipalUse: Dimensions grid axes — critical for site plans.

commands.name: Dim of Blks/Walls
commands.description: Dimensions blocks or walls.

commands.name: Dim of Cupboard
commands.description: Dimensions cupboards/cabinets.

commands.name: Dim of Steps
commands.description: Dimensions stair steps.

commands.name: Dim Fix Length Parts
commands.description: Dimensions fixed-length parts.

commands.name: Dim Breaks At Inters
commands.description: Breaks dimension lines at intersections.

commands.name: Dim Chord at Inters
commands.description: Dimensions chord length at intersection.

commands.name: Dim Arch at Inters
commands.description: Dimensions arc at intersection.

commands.name: Dim Rebuild by Texts
commands.description: Rebuilds dimensions based on text values.

commands.name: Dim Merge Baseline
commands.description: Merges baseline dimensions.

commands.name: Switch Dim Layer
commands.description: Switches the layer of selected dimensions.
commands.municipalUse: Sends dimensions to a dedicated layer for plotting control.

commands.name: Set Current DimStyle
commands.description: Sets the current dimension style.

commands.name: Dim Update By Style
commands.description: Updates dimensions to current style.

commands.name: Switch YQ DimStyle
commands.description: Switches to YQArch default dimension style.

commands.name: Adjust Text Position
commands.description: Adjusts the position of dimension text.

commands.name: Extend Dim Line
commands.description: Extends dimension lines.

commands.name: Split/Ext Into Many
commands.description: Splits a dimension into multiple segments.

commands.name: Merge Dims
commands.description: Merges multiple dimensions into one.

commands.name: Align Definition Pts
commands.description: Aligns dimension definition points.

commands.name: Align Dim MLine
commands.description: Aligns dimension multi-leader lines.

commands.name: Align Feet Point
commands.description: Aligns the feet points of dimensions.

commands.name: Fix Extension Lengths
commands.description: Fixes the length of extension lines.

commands.name: Adjust Base Spacing
commands.description: Adjusts base spacing for baseline dimensions.

commands.name: Batch Base Spacing
commands.description: Batch adjusts baseline spacing for multiple dimensions.

commands.name: Show Extension Lines
commands.description: Shows/hides extension lines.

commands.name: Aligned or Rotated
commands.description: Toggles dimension between aligned and rotated.

commands.name: Overturn Dim Text
commands.description: Flips the dimension text orientation.

commands.name: Lock The Text Content
commands.description: Locks the dimension text to prevent auto-update.

commands.name: Reset Default Value
commands.description: Resets dimension to its measured value.

commands.name: Units to Meter
commands.description: Converts dimension units to meters.

commands.name: Rounds Dim Value
commands.description: Rounds the dimension value to specified precision.

commands.name: New Dim Text
commands.description: Creates new custom dimension text.

commands.name: Move Dim Text
commands.description: Moves the dimension text.

commands.name: Reset Dim Text Home
commands.description: Resets dimension text to its default position.

categories.title: Curve & Polyline Tools
categories.description: Edit, join, split, and convert curves, polylines, arcs, and splines.

commands.name: Add/Remove Vertexes
commands.description: Adds or removes vertices on a polyline.

commands.name: Optimize Plines
commands.description: Optimizes polylines by removing redundant vertices.

commands.description: Converts a polyline segment to an arc.

commands.name: PLine Segment Width
commands.description: Sets the width of a polyline segment.

commands.name: PLine Segment Offset
commands.description: Offsets a polyline segment.

commands.name: Join PLine/Arc/Line
commands.description: Joins multiple polylines, arcs, and lines into one.

commands.name: Close PLine/Arc/Line
commands.description: Closes an open polyline, arc, or line.

commands.name: Reserve Curve Direct
commands.description: Reserves curve direction.

commands.name: W-PLine To Wireframe
commands.description: Converts a wide polyline to wireframe lines.

commands.name: Connect 2pline Vertexes
commands.description: Connects vertices of two polylines.

commands.name: Find Border/Outline
commands.description: Finds and traces the outer boundary of selected objects.
commands.municipalUse: Traces site boundary from imported raster or linework.

commands.name: Find Inner Contours
commands.description: Finds inner contours (holes) within a boundary.

commands.name: Contours + Offset
commands.description: Finds contours and creates offset outlines.

commands.name: Convert To Freehand
commands.description: Converts a polyline to a freehand sketch.

commands.name: Break To Equal Parts
commands.description: Breaks a curve into equal length segments.

commands.name: Divide By 2 Points
commands.description: Divides a curve between two picked points.

commands.name: Ellipse To Arcs
commands.description: Converts an ellipse to arc segments.

commands.name: Curve To Arc PLine
commands.description: Converts a spline/curve to an arc polyline.

commands.name: Curve To Line PLine
commands.description: Converts a spline/curve to a line polyline.

commands.name: Curve To Bowstrings
commands.description: Converts a curve to bowstring chords.

commands.name: Curve Projection
commands.description: Projects a curve onto a plane or surface.

categories.title: Extra Tools
categories.description: Double lines for roads, alignment tools, object breaking, and transformation utilities.

commands.name: Number Lines Manage
commands.description: Manages numbered line sets.

commands.name: Double Lines
commands.description: Draws double lines (parallel lines).
commands.municipalUse: ESSENTIAL for drawing roads (6m carriageway + 1.5m sidewalks), utility trenches, fence lines. Set spacing to road width.

commands.name: Double Lines Scissor
commands.description: Cuts or trims double lines at intersections.
commands.municipalUse: Clean road intersections and utility crossings.

commands.name: Double Line Thickness
commands.description: Changes the thickness/spacing of double lines.
commands.municipalUse: Adjust road width from 6m to 5.5m after municipal review.

commands.name: To Double Lines
commands.description: Converts single lines to double lines.

commands.name: Double Lines Offset
commands.description: Offsets double lines as a pair.

commands.name: Axis of Double Lines
commands.description: Draws the center axis of double lines.
commands.municipalUse: Create road centerlines for alignment and dimensioning.

commands.name: Objects Alignment
commands.description: Aligns multiple objects horizontally/vertically.

commands.name: Leaders Alignment
commands.description: Aligns multiple leader lines.

commands.name: Align Frame With Line
commands.description: Aligns a drawing frame to a selected line.

commands.name: Break By a Knife
commands.description: Breaks objects along a cutting line (like a knife).

commands.name: Break By Knives
commands.description: Breaks objects along multiple cutting lines.

commands.name: Break/Erase in Frames
commands.description: Breaks or erases objects inside a boundary frame.

commands.name: Copy/Paste The Detail
commands.description: Copies a detail view to another location.

commands.name: Transform
commands.description: Transforms objects with scale, rotate, and move combined.

commands.name: Bounding Box
commands.description: Creates a bounding box around selected objects.
commands.municipalUse: Creates a minimal box around a building for footprint area.

commands.name: To Bounding Box
commands.description: Converts selected objects to their bounding box.

commands.name: Minimum Bounding Box
commands.description: Creates the minimum area bounding box.

commands.name: Turn Objects
commands.description: Rotates objects 180 degrees around their center.

commands.name: Exchange Location
commands.description: Swaps positions of two objects.

commands.name: Copy to Points
commands.description: Copies an object to multiple selected points.

commands.name: Assistant Lines
commands.description: Draws construction/assistant lines.

categories.title: Modify Plus
categories.description: Advanced modification tools including per-object scaling, dynamic copy, and object breaking.

commands.name: Scale For Each
commands.description: Scales each selected object independently.

commands.name: Rotate For Each
commands.description: Rotates each selected object independently.

commands.name: Mirror For Each
commands.description: Mirrors each selected object independently.

commands.name: XY Scale
commands.description: Scales objects non-uniformly in X and Y directions.

commands.name: Dynamic Copy
commands.description: Creates dynamic copies that update with source changes.

commands.name: Stretch with Distance
commands.description: Stretches objects by a specified distance.

commands.name: Move with a Distance
commands.description: Moves objects by a specified distance.

commands.name: Memorial Move
commands.description: Moves objects but remembers original position.

commands.name: Memorial Copy
commands.description: Copies objects and remembers source position.

commands.name: Super Offset
commands.description: Offsets objects with multiple options.
commands.municipalUse: Offsets property lines, building setbacks, road edges.

commands.name: Extend to Point/Line
commands.description: Extends objects to a specified point or line.

commands.description: Links separate arcs, lines, or polylines into one.

commands.name: Connect 2 Group Lines
commands.description: Connects two groups of lines.

commands.name: Add/Remove Wipeout
commands.description: Adds or removes a wipeout mask to selected objects.

commands.name: Break All Objects
commands.description: Breaks all intersecting objects at intersection points.
commands.municipalUse: Breaks intersecting lines at utility crossings.

commands.name: Break And Erase Remains
commands.description: Breaks objects and erases the remaining parts.

commands.name: Break at A Point
commands.description: Breaks an object at a single point.

commands.name: Break at 2 Points
commands.description: Breaks an object between two points.

categories.title: Check & Correct

commands.name: Clear Z-axis of Objs
commands.description: Sets Z-coordinate of selected objects to zero.
commands.municipalUse: Flattens imported 3D survey data to 2D plan view. Very common with GPS survey imports.

commands.name: Clear Z-axis in Blks
commands.description: Clears Z-coordinates inside block definitions.

commands.name: Eliminate Overlapping
commands.description: Removes overlapping duplicate objects.
commands.municipalUse: Clean up duplicate lines from imported survey data. Critical before area calculations.

commands.name: Merge Overlap Lines
commands.description: Merges overlapping or collinear lines.

commands.name: Connect Lines / Arcs
commands.description: Connects lines and arcs that touch end-to-end.

commands.name: Remove Pt/Short Lines
commands.description: Removes points and very short lines.

commands.name: Adjust Objs To Grid
commands.description: Snaps objects to the current grid.

commands.name: Oblique Correction
commands.description: Corrects oblique/skewed objects.

commands.name: Dialog Merge
commands.description: Merges overlapping objects via dialog options.

commands.name: Purge All in DWG
commands.description: Purges all unused items (layers, blocks, styles).
commands.municipalUse: MUST-DO before submitting to municipality. Reduces file size and removes junk data.

commands.name: Purge DWGs in Folder
commands.description: Purges all DWG files in a selected folder.

commands.description: Checks and reports object colors.

commands.name: Find Non-Ortho Lines
commands.description: Finds lines that are not orthogonal.

commands.name: Orthoaxis Check
commands.description: Checks orthographic alignment.

commands.name: Revcloud

commands.municipalUse: Marks review comments or changes on revision sheets.

commands.name: Comment Frame
commands.description: Adds a comment frame/stamp.

commands.name: Heap Trees
commands.description: Places trees in plan (block library).

commands.name: Landscape Analyzing
commands.description: Analyzes landscape layout.

commands.description: Adds or removes a wipeout mask in a block.

commands.description: Explodes a minisert block.

commands.description: Explodes nested blocks (blocks within blocks).

commands.description: Modifies attribute values and properties.

commands.description: Increases numerical attribute values.

commands.description: Changes attribute properties (layer, style, etc.).

commands.name: Change Attribute to Text
commands.description: Converts an attribute to plain text.

commands.name: Erase Attribute in Block
commands.description: Erases an attribute from a block definition.

commands.name: YQ Block Library
commands.description: Opens the YQArch block library.
commands.municipalUse: ESSENTIAL — insert standard municipal symbols like manholes, streetlights, fire hydrants, trees, catch basins.

commands.name: User Block Library
commands.description: Opens user block library.

commands.name: User Block Library 1
commands.description: Opens first user block library folder.

commands.name: User Block Library 2
commands.description: Opens second user block library folder.

commands.name: User Block Library 3
commands.description: Opens third user block library folder.

categories.title: Hatching & Linetype

commands.name: Hatching Shortcuts
commands.description: Opens hatching tools shortcut panel.

commands.name: Change Hatching Scale
commands.description: Changes the scale of a hatch pattern.

commands.name: Quick Hatching
commands.description: Quickly hatches a closed boundary.

commands.description: Hatches using a predefined template pattern.

commands.description: Clips a hatch with a boundary.

commands.description: Splits a single hatch into separate hatches by boundary.

commands.description: Unions multiple hatches into one.

commands.name: Hatching Disassociate
commands.description: Disassociates a hatch from its boundary.

commands.description: Fills walls or columns with a hatch.

commands.name: Make a New Layer
commands.description: Creates a new layer.

commands.description: Saves or restores layer states.

commands.name: Turn Off Layers
commands.description: Turns off selected layers.

commands.description: Turns off all layers except the current.

commands.description: Unlocks selected layers.

commands.description: Freezes selected layers.

commands.description: Freezes a layer inside block definitions.

commands.description: Batch replaces one layer with another.

commands.description: Merges multiple layers into one.

commands.description: Manages layer shortcuts with wildcards.

commands.name: Color Shortcuts
commands.description: Opens color shortcut panel.

commands.description: Imports layer settings from a text file.
